package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
)

// scenario for json_decoder_recreated_per_item: json.NewDecoder(...) constructed repeatedly inside loops instead of reusing a stable decoder per stream.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule352NegativeRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario352Negative(writer io.Writer, value Rule352NegativeRecord) error {
	return json.NewEncoder(writer).Encode(value)
}
